results.description:
Today in History is the BEST way to get key facts about iconic global events and fun facts from across the centuries, delivered right to your mobile device. Our reminders will make sure you're never out of the loop.

Created for History, trivia, and knowledge lovers. Get all the important events of the day or narrow your selection down to one of our specific categories: Events, Births, Deaths, Holidays, and more…

We bring you the most important, epic, and memorable moments in History.

*** Find wisdom in quotes from historical figures.

*** Immerse yourself in the images that capture historical events as they happened.

*** Feel the emotion of the headlines that made the world stop and take notice.

By experiencing historical events from a variety of angles, you'll gain a new perspective on their importance and new insights into the people who shaped the history of our world.

----- GREAT FUN FOR EVERYONE -----

· Check it in the morning to get your brain pumping to start the day!
· Post your favorite fun facts to blogs and social media for inspiration and perspective!
· Share your favorite events and educate your friends and family!
· Challenge coworkers and friends with historical trivia!

----- TOP FEATURES -----

· Quote of the day: Timeless wisdom from iconic historical figures.
· Images: Visual representation of every event, headline, and Quote.
· Headlines: Details on significant events that have shaped our world.

----- PRO -----

For the ultimate history fans, we are adding the ability to support the future development of TIH and other educational products with our TIH Pro subscription, only $1.99/month.

Even if you don't subscribe, we appreciate your support. You inspire us to make more great apps like Today in History!Even if you don't subscribe we appreciate your support greatly. You inspire us to make more great apps like Today in History!

Embark on a captivating journey through time with "Back Today," your ultimate guide to exploring the rich tapestry of history. This app is meticulously crafted to bring the past to life, offering you a daily dose of historical events that have shaped our world. Whether you're a seasoned history enthusiast or someone with a budding curiosity, "Back Today" provides an engaging and educational experience that enriches your understanding of the past.
Comprehensive Historical Coverage:
Daily Historical Events: Discover a wide array of events that occurred on this day throughout history. From monumental discoveries and inventions to significant political milestones and cultural phenomena, our extensive database ensures you never miss a moment of history.
Localized and Personalized Content: Experience history like never before with content tailored to your region and language. "Back Today" supports a diverse range of languages, including English, Turkish, French, German, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese, Russian, Chinese, and Japanese, ensuring a personalized experience that resonates with you.
In-Depth Event Descriptions: Each historical event is accompanied by detailed descriptions, providing you with context and insights into its significance. Learn about the people, places, and circumstances that have influenced the course of history.
User-Centric Features:
Customizable Notifications: Stay informed and inspired with daily notifications that keep you updated on historical events. Customize your notification settings to receive alerts at times that suit your schedule, ensuring you never miss an opportunity to learn.
Intuitive and Elegant Design: Navigate through history with ease using our sleek and user-friendly interface. The app's design is optimized for a seamless experience, allowing you to explore events effortlessly and discover new insights.
Share and Engage: Found an event that piques your interest? Share it with friends, family, and fellow history enthusiasts via social media or messaging apps. Engage in meaningful conversations and connect with others who share your passion for history.
Offline Access for On-the-Go Learning: Enjoy uninterrupted access to historical events, even when you're offline. Perfect for travel or areas with limited connectivity, "Back Today" ensures you can delve into history anytime, anywhere.
Continuous Improvement and Community Engagement:
Regular Updates and Expansions: Our dedicated team is committed to providing the most accurate and comprehensive historical information. We continuously update our database and expand our coverage to enhance your experience and keep you informed.
Join a Thriving Community: Become part of a vibrant community of history lovers. Share your thoughts, discuss events, and connect with others who share your interest in the past. Together, we can explore the stories that have shaped our world.
Feedback and Support:
Your feedback is invaluable to us. We are dedicated to delivering the best possible user experience and welcome your suggestions and questions. Our support team is always ready to assist you, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable journey through history.
Download "Back Today" now and immerse yourself in the fascinating world of history. Discover the events that have defined our world and enrich your understanding of the past. With "Back Today," history is just a tap away, ready to inspire and educate you every day.

results.description:
Discover Historical moments and people That Shaped Today. Swipe through the past. Chat with history.

Premium AI Features
AI Deep Analysis : Go beyond Wikipedia with advanced AI that uncovers hidden connections, expert insights, and lasting impact of historical events.
Chat with Historical Figures : Have authentic conversations with history's greatest minds. Ask Napoleon about his campaigns, discuss philosophy with Socrates, or explore art with Leonardo da Vinci.

Core Features
Today Widget - History at a glance on your Home Screen
Interactive World Map - Visualize where history happened across continents
Stories Mode - Swipe through history like social media with engaging visuals
Smart Organization - Personal collections, filters by era, and offline reading
Social Sharing - Beautiful cards perfect for sharing discoveries

Perfect For
Students, curious learners, history enthusiasts, and anyone wanting to understand current events through historical context.
Transform your daily routine into a journey through time. Connect with the greatest minds in history and gain insights that bridge past and present.

Download now and make every day a learning adventure.

Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
Privacy Policy: https://jimjatt1999.github.io/zecro_studios/privacy-histories.html

Explore History in a Whole New Way!

Do you want to understand history but don’t have the time for lengthy books or documentaries? With Paladin: Learn History, you can uncover the stories of history’s greatest personalities in just 5 minutes! Our app combines the power of interactive learning with the excitement of game elements to make history fun, engaging, and easy to remember.

Key Features:

	•	Short, Curated Lessons: Discover captivating stories from history, centered around key figures like Cleopatra, Abraham Lincoln, and more. Each lesson is designed to be concise yet informative, giving you a deep understanding of important historical events and personalities.
	•	Interactive and Animated Content: History comes to life with our animated lessons! Engage with interactive elements that help you visualize the past, making learning both fun and memorable.
	•	Quizzes to Test Your Knowledge: Each lesson is followed by a quiz that challenges your understanding. Test your knowledge and see how well you’ve absorbed the material.
	•	Collectible Characters: As you progress, unlock collectible characters representing historical figures. Each character comes with its own unique backstory, offering additional insights into history.
	•	Game Elements: Level up as you learn! The more you engage with the app, the more characters and content you can unlock, keeping the learning experience fresh and exciting.

Why Choose Paladin?

Unlike traditional history apps, Paladin: Learn History is designed with friendliness and visual engagement in mind. We focus on making learning accessible, quick, and enjoyable. With our interactive approach and game-like features, history is no longer a subject to dread but a story to be explored and enjoyed.

What Users Are Saying:

“Paladin has turned my boring commutes into exciting history lessons! I love how easy it is to learn and retain information.” - Alex M.

“The animations and quizzes make learning history feel like a game. It’s so much more fun than reading a textbook!” - Sarah T.

Download Now and Begin Your Journey Through History!
Don’t just read about history—experience it! Download Paladin: Learn History today and start unlocking the secrets of the past, one story at a time.

Read more about our terms and conditions here:
Terms of service: https://learnpaladin.com/terms-of-service
Privacy policy: https://learnpaladin.com/privacy-policy

results.description:
History Hit TV is a new kind of history channel. We've built up an extensive library of history programmes: hundreds of hours of documentaries, exclusive original films, interviews and ad-free podcasts made for proper history fans.


*New programmes added every week

*Exclusive interviews with the world’s top historians

*Original documentaries from historic sites all over the world

*Listen to Dan Snow’s History Hit Podcast advert-free

*Download shows to watch on the go

Join the History Hit team. Download our app today to start exploring our ever-growing library of films and podcasts - available to watch and listen wherever you are.

Each of our documentaries and podcasts delve into key events from history with insights from experts, survivors, and historians. These are all downloadable onto any device so you can watch them even when you are offline.

Terms of Service: https://access.historyhit.com/tos
Privacy Policy: https://access.historyhit.com/privacy

Chronological events which happened on this day in history. These events come from various sources in various languages which you can select. 
You can browse all events of today using the arrows buttons. 
If you are interested in further information regarding a particular event, simply tap on the text and you get related links for that event.
There are many sources for events from all over the world in many different languages. Choose all you are interested in.

You want to know what happened on a certain date? 
You want to know which famous people have the same birthday with you? 100,000 events, births, and deaths are available offline for you in this amazing app. 
Most entries have links to Wikipedia. With a network connection, simply click on the hyperlinks on the entries for more information on Wikipedia. 


------ Fantastic Features ------ 

- Display historical events, birthdays and deaths 
- User friendly interface: jump to any date on a calendar by clicking on the date 
- Tap on an entry to share interesting events with friends via Facebook, Twitter and Email
- Over 100,000 events available offline 
- Hyperlinks to full articles on Wikipedia
- Interesting events per push notification

Don't forget to share this app with your friends. Thank you!

results.releaseNotes: - Fixed issue with Today widget background Color
results.description:
Calendarium is new, easy to use calendar which gives you a new way to discover many interesting things about this day.

Calendarium combines calendar of historical events with times of sunrise/sunset, number of week, day, day length, moon phase and more.   

–– What our users think ––

" Fascinating!" –  Snaarl

"It is a great way to see the history of the day. I always learn something new."  -   Nancy Rohe

"Use this app every day! Fun to learn new info from a wide time range of history." - M1d2i3v4

"This is a trivia nerd's Nirvana, and a history buff's Beulah! Bravo! to the developers of this app!" –  jmhillpresley
––––––
• #1 App in 3 Countries
• #1 Reference App in 40 Countries
• Over half million downloads
––––––

Features: 
  • On this day in history - Discover historical events and holidays and share it with your friends via mail, Twitter, Facebook or text message 
  • Sunrise and sunset time 
  • Planets View - Shows how all planets of solar system are aligned right now
  • Week number, day number, weekday and year
  • Number of days passed from 1 Jan and days left until 31 Dec
  • Moon phase
  • Day length 
  • Geographic coordinates 
  • No Internet connection required

-- Calendarium uses your location only to provide accurate information about sunrise, sunset times and length of the day. We do not store it in any way. Disabling location settings will disable only these features --

results.releaseNotes:
A brand new Local section is now available - discover notable events, births, and deaths from your own region.
Improved the overall content and user experience, with richer photos and smoother browsing.
results.description:
On This Day brings history to life, every single day. 

Explore events, births, and deaths that shaped the world, from ancient times to modern headlines. Each entry is carefully presented with context, images, and quotes that let you feel the atmosphere of the past.

What sets On This Day apart is the Local section. Here you can discover what happened in your own country or region on this day in history - famous people born nearby, significant local events, and stories that connect global history to your home. No other history app gives you this personal perspective.

Whether you’re fascinated by politics, science, music, or sports, you’ll find something new every day. Scroll through centuries of knowledge, relive iconic moments, and gain fresh insights into how the past continues to shape the present.

On This Day is made for history lovers, trivia fans, and anyone curious about the world we live in.
